verdict: An absolute masterclass in Easy chart design, featuring flawless rhythm sync, extremely comfortable cradle-flow streams, and smart, structured difficulty progression.

issues.problem: Continuous 26-note stream of 1/4 notes is technically long for an Easy chart, though the low BPM (137) and repeating, highly comfortable 'cradle' pattern (R-U-D, L-U-D) make it exceptionally accessible and fun to play.
